attempt_local_note: Third bounded repair in the attempt-local B -> C1 -> C2 -> C3 lineage (R5.2 mechanism). C3 is materialized as C2's hash-bound repair child with the same minimal honest artifact set as C1/C2 (adjudication, attribution, repaired tex, compile evidence, crops, provenance, regression, declared-boundary replay). No closed-loop-attempt-state.v1 leaf exists for this lineage, so the canonical v4 packet machinery cannot bind here.

measured_geometry_cm.method: pdftotext -bbox word boxes + check_panel_boundary_coverage frame lines. Calibration (bottom row): global_x_pt = 28.3468*global_cm + 4.344 (cross-checked on the D-right/E-left/F-left/F-right frame positions 138.991/146.078/287.812/422.459); panel_x = (pt-4.344)/28.3468 - shift (E shift 5.0, F shift 10.0).

driven_electrode.note: moving the label 0.25 cm toward its own electrode-bar referent produced one sub-threshold visual_clash near_miss on 'driven' (dark=0.019, promotion_tier=null); the leader still connects and the after-PNG reads clean (see regression.json).

compile.strict_failure_cause: check_visual_clash --strict is the same pre-existing strict failure carried from B/C1/C2 (identical mechanism recorded in C2's provenance); it is unrelated to this label repair. undeclared_geometry stays 0. Strict was never expected to pass for this lineage.

evidence_crops.print_scale_note: Full figure at true publication width 155.9 mm rendered at 300 dpi (1842 px wide).
evidence_crops.note: target crops are Panel F before(C2)/after(C3) showing both repaired labels; neighbor crop is Panel E + D-E gutter showing the left-open 'grounded substrate'.

human_review.note: Step 10: no self-issued development verdict. The named human delegated the adjudication of these same-class defects but the final C3 development-baseline verdict routes to the named human. One caveat to surface: the sub-threshold near_miss 'driven'; and two open items (grounded substrate, grounded source return).
